---
title: "Catatan Belajar"
listing:
  id: main-listing
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
  max-description-length: 300
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<!--
  Homepage: Arsip Catatan Belajar
  Layout: topic-grouped listing with tag filter + search
-->

<div class="home-header" style="max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 2rem;">
  <h1 style="font-size:1.7rem;letter-spacing:-0.02em;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">
    Arsip Catatan
  </h1>
  <p style="color:#777;font-size:0.92rem;line-height:1.65;margin:0;">
    Kumpulan catatan belajar mandiri — tidak ada nama, tidak ada agenda.
    Hanya teks, referensi, dan pertanyaan yang belum terjawab.
  </p>
</div>

<!-- ── TAG FILTER BAR ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="home-controls" style="max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;">
  <p class="filter-section-label">Filter berdasarkan topik</p>
  <div id="tag-filter-bar">
    <!-- Tag buttons will be injected by JS -->
    <button id="tag-reset-btn" onclick="resetTagFilter()" style="display:none;">
      × Reset filter
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {#main-listing}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  'use strict';

  // ── Wait for Quarto listing to render ──────────────────────────
  function init() {
    const listing = document.querySelector('#main-listing');
    if (!listing) { setTimeout(init, 150); return; }

    const items = listing.querySelectorAll('.listing-item');
    if (items.length === 0) { setTimeout(init, 150); return; }

    // ── Collect all unique categories from listing items ─────────
    const tagSet = new Set();
    items.forEach(item => {
      const catLinks = item.querySelectorAll('.listing-category');
      catLinks.forEach(link => {
        tagSet.add(link.textContent.trim());
      });
    });

    // ── Render tag buttons ────────────────────────────────────────
    const bar = document.getElementById('tag-filter-bar');
    const resetBtn = document.getElementById('tag-reset-btn');

    [...tagSet].sort().forEach(tag => {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.className = 'tag-btn';
      btn.textContent = tag;
      btn.setAttribute('data-tag', tag);
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => applyFilter(tag, btn));
      bar.insertBefore(btn, resetBtn);
    });

    // ── Read URL hash on load (e.g. index.html#tag=Python) ───────
    const hashTag = getHashTag();
    if (hashTag) {
      const matchBtn = bar.querySelector(`[data-tag="${hashTag}"]`);
      if (matchBtn) applyFilter(hashTag, matchBtn);
    }
  }

  function getHashTag() {
    const match = window.location.hash.match(/^#tag=(.+)$/);
    return match ? decodeURIComponent(match[1]) : null;
  }

  let activeTag = null;

  function applyFilter(tag, btn) {
    const listing = document.querySelector('#main-listing');
    const items = listing.querySelectorAll('.listing-item');
    const allBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.tag-btn');
    const resetBtn = document.getElementById('tag-reset-btn');

    // Toggle off if same tag clicked twice
    if (activeTag === tag) {
      resetTagFilter();
      return;
    }

    activeTag = tag;

    // Update button states
    allBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b === btn));

    // Filter items
    items.forEach(item => {
      const catTexts = [...item.querySelectorAll('.listing-category')]
        .map(el => el.textContent.trim());
      const match = catTexts.includes(tag);
      item.setAttribute('data-filtered', match ? 'false' : 'true');
    });

    resetBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';

    // Update URL hash without page jump
    history.replaceState(null, '', `#tag=${encodeURIComponent(tag)}`);
  }

  // Exposed globally for onclick handler
  window.resetTagFilter = function () {
    activeTag = null;
    const listing = document.querySelector('#main-listing');
    const items = listing ? listing.querySelectorAll('.listing-item') : [];
    items.forEach(item => item.removeAttribute('data-filtered'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.tag-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('tag-reset-btn').style.display = 'none';
    history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname);
  };

  // Kick off after DOM ready
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();
</script>
```
